word: G4683 - σπαργανόω - sparganóō - spar-gan-o'-o - Wrap in swaddling clothes

sections.paragraph:
σπαργανόω - sparganoō - spar-gan-o'-o

From σπάργανον sparganon (a strip; from a derivative of the base of G4682 meaning to strap or wrap with strips); to swathe (an infant after the Oriental custom): - wrap in swaddling clothes.
